title: GK-2A LRIT ( Low-Rate Image Transmission )
short description: LRIT (Low-Rate Image Transmission) is used to transmit images on the GK-2A satellite
description: **Geo-KOMPSAT-2A** (GK2A) is a geostationary meteorological satellite (located at 128.2° E) operated by the Korea Meteorological Administration (KMA). (NORAD: 43823. Int: 2018-100A.)
